projectDescription: A fork of Prism Launcher that adds integrated Ely.by account support via OAuth2 and official Ely.by authlib patches, enabling Minecraft players to use alternative authentication with full skin support across servers.
keyFeatures: Ely.by OAuth2 authentication - credentials never leave the browser
Official Ely.by authlib patches for server-side skin support
Microsoft (MSA) account support retained alongside Ely.by
Offline mode for playing without an account
Instance isolation - keep multiple Minecraft setups cleanly separated
Integrated mod and modpack installation from CurseForge, Modrinth, and more
Skin and cape management directly from the launcher
publicApiSurface: AccountState enum: Unchecked, Offline, Working, Online, Disabled, Errored, Expired, Gone
ElyStep / ElyDeviceCodeStep - OAuth2 authentication flow for Ely.by
MinecraftProfileStepEly - profile retrieval via Ely.by API
PineconeNetworkCheck - network availability and URL resolution
SkinList / SkinUpload / SkinDelete / CapeChange - skin/cape management
epl_metadata.json - authlib override mappings and authlib-injector URL
